stemHtml: In cruise, you hear a click on the ATC frequency — no speech, but the frequency is blocked. What is most likely happening?

options.a: A station is transmitting but its carrier wave is not modulated.
options.b: The ATC station is not broadcasting the modulated carrier.
options.c: The receiving station sends an unmodulated signal.
options.d: Only sidebands are being transmitted, carrier wave missing.
